ideation: This sequence aims to capture the whimsical and elegant nature of the elf emoji.  The animation will focus on a gentle, flowing arm movement that suggests a graceful, almost ethereal quality.  We'll use a three-frame sequence to highlight the key moments of the gesture. Frame 1 will show the arms in a relaxed yet poised position. Frame 2 will showcase a fluid arm movement, almost like a gentle wave or a gesture of invitation, and frame 3 will bring the arms back to a relaxed position. The slight variations in the arm positions will create a sense of movement and grace.  The use of both arms in a coordinated motion will enhance the overall effect, mimicking the elegance often associated with elves.

frames.beat: arms poised gracefully at the sides, ready to move
both arms sweep outward and up in a gentle, welcoming gesture
arms return to a relaxed, elegant resting pose
